（为爱发电，不喜轻喷）
听说泥头车是穿越者必备神器？什么，见多了？哪会拐弯的呢？
好了，现在我是神谷悠也，一个土生土长的米花人···
悠也，你要老婆不要？要的话···我自己去！趁着琴酒不注意，突然抢走雪莉···
救下宫野姐妹，送琴酒进局子，偷偷统一东京地下势力，玩弄柯南···
抱歉毛利大叔，这辆跑车是我的了···
来都来了，那就好好当个名侦探吧。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/540b4e5b76e6d2f7de646091928252b4","author":"铅笔画了一个星期","author_id":"","book_id":"7333771936771607577","book_name":"关于我当上雪莉男友这件事","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8723人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7333771971185869337","read_count":"8723","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3636306"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"1591","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,单女主,同人,1v1,无后宫,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/39893e13bf294da1cc553d9dceee7251~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301092&x-signature=eOEaG2RxiHWCFpZjhaWpi6Y6I5M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},
